metadata.keywords: software engineering, web development, portfolio, student, programming

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Get to know me better
bio: I am a {age}-year-old software engineering student based in Oviedo, Spain. My profile is focused on software engineering, with the main goal of developing high-quality solutions, implementing the best security practices in the process.
I have gained valuable experience through various projects, both individual and collaborative, which have strengthened my skills in different areas.
I consider myself a proactive person, with problem-solving skills and a commitment to continuous learning. I enjoy teamwork and strive to contribute significantly to the projects I am involved in.
In my free time, I keep up to date with the latest trends within the industry. I also enjoy reading, sports, and exploring new cultures through travel.

technicalSkills.technologies: AWS, Azure, Vercel, Docker, Git, GitHub

items.title: BSc in Software Engineering (English-taught)
description: Enrolled in the English-taught bilingual program
4-year on-campus bachelor in the School of Computer Engineering at the University of Oviedo.
Learning about the basic concepts of computer science, including programming, algorithms, data structures, operating systems, networks and databases.
Immersion in web development, software architecture and cybersecurity.
Participation in practical projects and collaborative efforts that have strengthened my technical skills and teamwork abilities.

items.title: Honors in Software Architecture
items.description: Achieved the highest honors distinction in the Software Architecture course. Awarded best course project among all teams for outstanding application of software architecture principles.

items.title: Honors in ASLEPI
items.description: Matrícula de Honor in ASLEPI (Social, Legal, Ethical and Professional Aspects of Computing).

items.title: Web Development Certification
items.description: Certification in web development technologies, including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern frameworks.

items.title: Cambridge English B2 Certificate
items.description: Cambridge qualification demonstrating upper-intermediate proficiency in English.

items.title: National Security Framework
items.description: Certification in the National Security Framework, focusing on information security management and best practices.

items.title: Google: Artificial Intelligence & Productivity
items.description: Google course on artificial intelligence and its application in personal and professional productivity.

items.title: AWS Serverless Architecture University Microcredential
items.description: University microcredential in serverless architectures with microservices on AWS, issued as a European Digital Credential for Learning.

items.title: Intern as Software Engineer
description: Support in project management using agile methodologies
Tracking and control of milestones: use of professional tools like Jira to monitor task progress and ensure deadline compliance.
Interdepartmental communication: collaboration in managing communication between the technical team and various stakeholders to facilitate workflow.
Process documentation: preparation and updating of progress reports and necessary technical documentation for the software delivery lifecycle.
Workflow optimization: learning and applying performance metrics to identify bottlenecks in the development process.

1.title: WiChat - Quiz Game Platform
1.description: Development of a web application quiz contest inspired by the TV show 'Saber y Ganar'. The platform offers real-time multiplayer gaming, timed challenges, rankings, and different question categories.

2.title: DLP - Making a Compiler from scratch
2.description: Development of a compiler from scratch using Java. Includes lexical analysis, parsing, and code generation.

3.title: Database Management System
3.description: Implementation of a database management system (DBMS) from scratch using C++. Features include basic queries, data storage, and index optimization.

4.title: Shell
4.description: Development of a functional shell in C that supports basic commands, input/output redirection, and background process execution.

5.title: Task Manager
5.description: Web application for task management that allows users to create, edit, and organize tasks with an authentication system and a modern interface.

6.title: SVAES - Automated Software Delivery Verification System (BSc Thesis)
6.description: My final degree project: a multi-tenant platform that automatically verifies the coherence, integrity, and completeness of software deliveries across external systems, combining a FastAPI backend, an Angular frontend, and a Rust verification engine.

7.title: F1 Desktop Application
7.description: Desktop application to manage and visualize information related to Formula 1, including teams, drivers, and race results.

8.title: HTTP Server
8.description: Implementation of a basic HTTP server capable of handling GET and POST requests, serving static files, and processing forms.

9.title: Url Shortener
9.description: Web application that allows users to shorten long URLs. Made using Spring & MongoDB

10.title: Nutrition AI
10.description: Complete nutrition tracking application that uses Artificial Intelligence to analyze food images and provide detailed nutritional information. Built for Android.

konami.title: Developer mode unlocked
bootLines: Spinning up too many side projects.......... OK
lines: You just found the developer easter egg.
Fun fact: this site runs on Next.js, Tailwind, and way too much coffee.
Type 'help' to see what this terminal can do.

headersValidator.title: HTTP Headers Validator
headersValidator.description: Analyze HTTP security headers of any website to identify potential vulnerabilities and security improvements.

descriptions.CORS: Controls which origins can access your website's resources.
descriptions.CSP: Defines which resources can be loaded to prevent XSS attacks.
descriptions.HSTS: Forces HTTPS usage for all future communications.
descriptions.X-Frame-Options: Prevents your site from being loaded in a frame/iframe by other sites.
descriptions.X-Content-Type-Options: Prevents MIME sniffing and enforces declared Content-Type.
descriptions.Referrer-Policy: Controls how much referrer information is included with requests.
descriptions.Permissions-Policy: Controls which browser features can be used.

errors.networkError: Error connecting to server. Please try again.

passwordChecker.title: Password Checker
passwordChecker.description: Analyze the strength of your passwords by calculating entropy and checking character diversity to improve your digital security.
passwordChecker.minLengthWarning: Your password is too short! It must be at least {min} characters.

strengthRemarks.veryWeak: ⚠️ Very Weak: Easily guessable! Change it immediately.
strengthRemarks.weak: ⚠️ Weak: Can be cracked quickly. Use a stronger password.
strengthRemarks.moderate: ✅ Moderate: Decent password, but can still be improved.
strengthRemarks.strong: ✅ Strong: Hard to guess, but consider making it longer.
strengthRemarks.veryStrong: ✅ Very Strong: Excellent password! Highly secure.

certificatesChecker.title: SSL/TLS Certificate Checker
certificatesChecker.description: Analyze SSL/TLS certificates from websites to verify their validity, issuer, expiration dates, and security configuration.
certificatesChecker.portHelp: Port where the SSL/TLS service is running. Common ports:

errors.invalidHost: Invalid host. Enter a valid IP address or domain name.
errors.invalidPort: Invalid port. Must be between 1 and 65535.
errors.connectionError: Connection error. Check the host and port.
errors.certificateError: Error getting certificate. Verify that the SSL/TLS service is available.

portScanner.title: Port Scanner
portScanner.description: Analyze TCP port accessibility on remote hosts to verify available services and perform basic security audits.
portScanner.portsHelp: Enter individual ports (80), ranges (22-25), or comma-separated lists (80,443,22-25)

errors.invalidHost: Invalid host. Enter a valid IP address or domain name.
errors.networkError: Network error. Check your internet connection.

webDiscovery.title: Web Content Discovery
webDiscovery.description: Enumerate paths and resources on a website. Useful for reconnaissance and audits.
webDiscovery.threadsHelp: Number of concurrent worker threads for scanning

errors.invalidUrl: Invalid URL. Include http:// or https://
errors.wordlistMissing: Empty wordlist. Add paths to scan.
